---
name: Ambiguity or bug
about: Report inconsistent prose, schema, examples, or expected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Artifact and version

Identify the draft, schema, example, or case.

## Observed behavior

What does the current material say or permit?

## Expected behavior

What should independent implementations agree on?

## Minimal example

Provide the smallest non-sensitive document that demonstrates the problem.

## Impact

Explain interoperability, security, compatibility, or authoring consequences.
